<?php namespace Resend\ValueObjects\Transporter; use Resend\Contracts\Stringable; final class BaseUri implements Stringable { /** * Create a new Base URI value object. */ public function __construct( private readonly string $baseUri ) { // } /** * Create a new Base URI value object from the the given URI. */ public static function from(string $baseUri): self { return new self($baseUri); } /** * Returns the string representation of the object. */ public function toString(): string { foreach (['http://', 'https://'] as $protocol) { if (str_starts_with($this->baseUri, $protocol)) { return str_ends_with($this->baseUri, '/') ? "{$this->baseUri}" : "{$this->baseUri}/"; } } return "https://{$this->baseUri}/"; } }
